title: Premium Car Model Collectible Poster AI
sourceTitle: Premium Car Model Collectible Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Stunning premium car poster for Porsche 911 GT3 RS, positioning the vehicle as the dominant centerpiece in a bold three-quarter side angle. Subject: Porsche 911 GT3 RS appears with aggressive stance, flawless proportions, luxury wheels, distinctive headlights, aerodynamic bodywork, spoilers, performance accents, glossy paint sheen, and high-end design cues. Scene: Premium automotive poster environment with subtle motifs from the car history, including ghost blueprint lines, motorsport heritage, silhouette overlays, legendary circuits, mechanical diagrams, and velocity graphics, collector-print atmosphere, and vivid non-black-heavy background contrast. Composition: Vehicle dominates the frame while crisp typography layers in Porsche, model designation, horsepower rating, 0-60 time, top speed, engine details, and track milestones, engine details, iconic milestones, and crisp premium typography integrated around the body lines woven into the layout. Signature Elements: Preserved premium car model collectible poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Top-tier automotive advertising poster, luxury magazine quality, slick graphic design, razor-sharp reflections, cinematic illumination, collectible poster feel, scroll-stopping energy, and polished premium masterpiece finish. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Cinematic illumination with razor-sharp vehicle reflections, bright rim highlights on bodywork, clean typography readability, and polished studio-meets-track contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
